properties.verseOrder: v1 v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1 v5 v1 v6 v1 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Give, and it will come back to you Good measure, pressed down, shaken together, and running over Give, and it will come back to you When you give, give to the Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Give in love, give in faith Give with joy, and the smile on your face Give as the Lord has given to you How you give is a reflection of your gratitude

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: From your heart Give your best Give unto God And you will be blessed Don't be stingy And don't be tight Learn from the widow In the Bible Who gave her last dime

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: People rob God when they don't give tithes and offerings And they don't understand why they've been cut off From heavenly blessings But abundant life and prosperity begins When you prove your love to God by giving to Him

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: When you give Give to the Lord

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: When you give, give to the Lord
